data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for Instagram bio link integration.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific need for 'Instagram bio link integration.' However, the evidence provided does not explicitly confirm the existence of this integration or its functionality. While there are successful booking transactions, there is no direct evidence indicating that the Instagram bio link is operational, which constitutes a gap in the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the existence or functionality of the Instagram bio link integration.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
